title: Principal Radiologist at Solara Active Pharma

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Solara Active Pharma
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Solara Active Pharma in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Solara Active Pharma:
Solara Active Pharma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Solara Active Pharma!
